name: windows-webgpu-dawn-green
description: Known-green Windows WebGPU/Dawn build lane from dawn-api-compat39.
notes: Future build bundles include patch-manifest.json with exact patch names and SHA256 hashes.
The current green build completed at -j8 on r7i.4xlarge with local sccache enabled and verified.
Sccache is verified through CMakeCache.txt, build.ninja, and sccache-report.json. The repeat lane forces CMAKE_MSVC_DEBUG_INFORMATION_FORMAT=Embedded for cacheable MSVC object debug info.
